revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cleanup_section%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template is a wrapper for {{Tlx|Cleanup}} ==Usage== {{Tlc|Cleanup section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|reason{{=}}}} To be placed in sections that need attention. Full instructions are given at {{Tlx|Cleanup}}. To show it compressed at the left side of the section, add the parameter small=left. {{Sandbox other|| }} ===TemplateData=== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "reason": { "label": "Reason", "type": "string", "required": true, "description": "Reason for requesting cleanup", "example": "The article is full of incorrect capitalization." }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "suggested": true, "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full).", "example": "January 2013", "type": "line", "autovalue": "May 2025" }, "small": { "label": "Make template small", "description": "Enter \"left\" here to make the template box small and aligned to the left.", "type": "string", "autovalue": "left" }, "talksection": { "label": "Talk page section", "description": "The section of the talk page explaining what needs to be done", "type": "string" }, "nocat": { "label": "No category", "description": "Suppress categorization", "type": "string" }, "demospace": {} }, "description": "This tag is intended to identify pages that need wikification or the correction of spelling, grammar, typographical errors, tone, and other similar, non-content-focused changes. Use this tag when the article needs improvement per WP:BETTER.", "format": "inline" } [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Wikipedia section templates]] [[Category:Cleanup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
